# HoloScript Trait Mappings — Auto-Generated

> **Generated**: 2026-04-14 by `node scripts/generate-trait-mappings.mjs`
> **Categories**: 115 | **Traits**: 2775 | **Compilers with trait support**: 23
>
> Re-run the generator to update. Do not edit this file manually.

## Trait Resolution Pipeline

```
.holo source → Parser → Compiler → Runtime
  @trait_name    tokenize    compile to target-native    register handler
```

## Verification

```bash
# Regenerate this file
node scripts/generate-trait-mappings.mjs

# Count traits from source
grep -roh "'[a-z_]*'" packages/core/src/traits/constants/*.ts | sort -u | wc -l

# Count categories
ls packages/core/src/traits/constants/*.ts | grep -v index | wc -l
```
